name: Ph.D. in Civil Engineering

dimensions.name: Curriculum coherence & progression
dimensions.justification: The five referenced courses are all research vehicles (CE 725/726 Independent Study I/II, CE 791 Graduate Seminar at 0 credits, CE 792 Pre-Doctoral Dissertation), which form a logical research spine of independent study to seminar to pre-doctoral dissertation appropriate for a doctorate. However, no advanced coursework or breadth requirement is surfaced, so the page shows the dissertation milestones without the disciplinary depth that distinguishes a Civil Engineering Ph.D.
dimensions.suggestion: Surface the required advanced-coursework breadth (structures, geotechnical, transportation, water/environmental) and the qualifying-exam and candidacy milestones so the doctoral progression, not only the dissertation vehicles, is visible.

dimensions.name: Prerequisite structure health
dimensions.justification: deepestPrereqChain is 0 and none of the visible research courses lists a course prerequisite, which is expected for a doctorate where gating is by advisor approval and qualifying exams (CE 792 is co-requisite with CE 791) rather than by a course graph. The single missingCourseCount is CE 790A, the dissertation course, so the one dangling reference is the culminating vehicle and should be resolved.
dimensions.suggestion: Add CE 790A (Doctoral Dissertation) to the catalog so the culminating course resolves, and note qualifying-exam prerequisites explicitly rather than leaving research milestones ungated.

dimensions.name: Learning outcomes & objectives
dimensions.justification: No program-level learning outcomes or educational objectives appear in the data, so a prospective doctoral student cannot judge the research competencies (independent investigation, dissertation defense, scholarly communication) the program certifies.
dimensions.suggestion: Publish 4-5 Ph.D. learning outcomes describing the original-research, methodological, and dissemination competencies expected at candidacy and defense.

dimensions.name: Credit distribution & balance
dimensions.justification: statedTotalCredits is 12 with creditReconcileDelta null; the 12 credits reflect the research/seminar block shown, not the full doctoral total (typically 60+ credits post-B.S. or ~30+ post-M.S.), so the coursework-versus-research split is not transparent.
dimensions.suggestion: State the full doctoral credit requirement and how it divides among required coursework, dissertation research (CE 792/790A), and seminar so the 12-credit figure is not read as the whole degree.

dimensions.name: Presentation & clarity
dimensions.justification: The four visible courses carry clear administrative descriptions (approvals required, dissertation/thesis registration rules, seminar format), but the page has no plan of study, no labeled milestones, and no outcomes, leaving it readable but incomplete for orienting a doctoral applicant.
dimensions.suggestion: Add a structured plan of study with candidacy, dissertation-proposal, and defense stages and a short program overview above the course list.

dimensions.name: Industry & currency relevance
dimensions.justification: The visible courses are content-neutral research vehicles (independent study, seminar, pre-doctoral dissertation), so disciplinary currency cannot be read from the page; a research doctorate's relevance lives in its faculty research areas, which are not surfaced here.
dimensions.suggestion: List the department's active research thrusts (resilient/smart infrastructure, sustainable materials, geotechnical, water resources) so prospective students can see where the doctorate is current.

descriptionQuality.justification: The four descriptions present are clear and specific about registration approvals, dissertation/thesis restrictions, and seminar format, but they are administrative rather than content-bearing, so they convey process well while saying little about scholarly substance.

prerequisiteClarity.justification: Prerequisites are expressed as advisor/instructor approvals and a co-requisite (CE 792 with CE 791), which is unambiguous and internally consistent; the only gap is the dangling CE 790A dissertation reference.

missingTopics.rationale: Only research vehicles (CE 725/726/791/792) are shown; the required depth/breadth graduate coursework that defines a Civil Engineering doctorate is absent from the page.
No formal research-methods, experimental-design, or applied-statistics course is referenced, yet these underpin dissertation-quality civil engineering research.
Finite-element, numerical, and data-driven modeling are standard doctoral tools in civil engineering but are not visible among the referenced courses.
The page lists CE 792 pre-doctoral dissertation but no qualifying-exam or candidacy milestone, leaving the doctoral gating undocumented.

emergingTrends.rationale: Sensor-instrumented, climate-resilient infrastructure is a leading civil-engineering doctoral direction the program should foreground as a research thrust.

emergingTrends.trend: AI and machine learning for structural/geotechnical analysis
emergingTrends.rationale: Data-driven surrogate modeling and structural-health monitoring are rapidly becoming core doctoral research tools worth an explicit methods course.
Decarbonizing concrete and construction materials is a major research frontier a modern civil doctorate should position for.

emergingTrends.trend: Digital twins and BIM-driven asset management
emergingTrends.rationale: Lifecycle digital-twin modeling of infrastructure is an emerging research area that pairs naturally with the department's infrastructure focus.

topSuggestions: Surface the required advanced coursework, qualifying exam, and candidacy milestones so the page represents the full doctoral progression, not just the dissertation vehicles.
Publish 4-5 Ph.D.-level learning outcomes describing original-research and dissemination competencies.
Resolve the dangling CE 790A dissertation reference in the catalog.
State the full doctoral credit total and its coursework-versus-research split so the 12-credit figure is not mistaken for the whole degree.
List active departmental research thrusts so prospective students can gauge the doctorate's currency.
